spec.description: UniFi Poller v2.0 Displays detailed information for network Sites in a UniFi controller using Prometheus.
Shows data transfer for each subsystem on the site. RX is on the negative axis.
spec.title: Data Transfer

spec.description: This graphs shows clients connected to the site.
spec.title: Client Counts

options.content:
Each site contains 5 subsystems: wan, lan, wlan, www, vpn. Each subsystem contains data specific to that system. 
All subsystems except vpn have data rate. VPN has data transfer though.
There's not a ton of juicy info here, and most of it can be gleaned on other the dashboards.
The row below is purposely collapsed because some installationd have hundreds of sites. 
Loading them all at once is often not possible.

spec.description: These are counters, totals, but they don't change much so the graph does not show rate.
spec.title: Item Counts

spec.description: This graphs shows clients connected to the site.
spec.title: VPN Users Data Rate

spec.description: This graph only works if DPI is enabled on the controller and DPI collection is enabled in UniFi Poller. Rx is on the negative axis.
spec.title: Data Transfer by Category
UniFi-Poller: Network Sites - Prometheus
